retry_reason: The refcount set (kref_init) is unconditional and always succeeds after allocation; retry is not applicable to the refcount operation itself.
contract_summary: set-wrapper: allocates and initializes a new fw_event_work with an initial reference count of 1. The caller receives ownership of the object and must call kref_put (typically via a dedicated release function) to release the reference when the event is no longer needed. If allocation fails, returns NULL - caller must check the return value. The kref_init establishes the first reference; the caller is responsible for the final put.
